metaDescription: Residential Solar for Australian Homes, Power Your Home with Smart, Affordable Solar.

props.title: Let's put solar
props.description: Residential Solar for Australian Homes, Power Your Home with Smart, Affordable Solar Take control of rising electricity costs with a custom-designed residential solar system built for Australian conditions. Whether you’re looking to reduce your power bills, increase your home’s value, or gain energy independence with battery storage, we make switching to solar simple and stress-free.

props.heading: Why More Australians Are Choosing Solar
props.description: Electricity prices across Australia continue to rise. Installing solar panels is one of the smartest long-term investments you can make for your home.

benefits.title: Lower Your Power Bills
benefits.desc: Generate your own electricity and significantly reduce your quarterly bills.

benefits.title: Protection from Rising Energy Prices
benefits.desc: Lock in long-term savings and reduce dependence on energy retailers.

benefits.title: Increase Property Value
benefits.desc: Homes with solar systems are more attractive to buyers and often sell faster.

benefits.title: Environmentally Friendly
benefits.desc: Reduce your carbon footprint and contribute to a cleaner, more sustainable Australia.

incentives.title: Government Incentives Available
incentives.subtitle: STCs · Cheaper Home Batteries
points: Eligible homeowners can benefit from the Small-scale Renewable Energy Scheme (SRES) which provides STCs (Small-scale Technology Certificates) that reduce upfront system costs.
You may also be eligible for around a 30% discount on the upfront cost of installing a battery system through the Cheaper Home Batteries Program.
The discount is based on battery size (usable capacity) and is funded by the Australian Government.

props.heading: How Solar Works
props.description: Understanding your system is the first step to energy independence.

steps.title: 1. Solar Panels
steps.desc: When sunlight hits your panels, they generate DC electricity. Even on cloudy days, your system produces power. Excess energy flows back to the grid for credits (Net Metering).

steps.title: 2. Solar Inverters
steps.desc: The inverter is the heart of the system, converting DC power to usable AC power for your home. We use premium Enphase microinverters or SolarEdge optimizers for maximum efficiency.

steps.title: 3. Power Outages?
steps.desc: Standard grid-tied systems shut off during outages for safety. To keep lights on during a blackout, you need a battery backup solution integrated with your solar.

steps.title: 4. Solar + Battery
steps.desc: Batteries store excess solar energy for use at night or during outages. We design systems that power your essential appliances (fridges, lights, wifi) indefinitely.

items.title: How long do solar panels last?
items.desc: Modern solar panels are built to last, with most high-quality panels producing power for 30+ years. While efficiency slightly decreases over time (about 0.5% per year), reputable brands guarantee over 90% output even after 25 years.

items.title: Maintenance Requirements
items.desc: Solar panels require very minimal maintenance. In most climates, rain naturally cleans the panels. We recommend an occasional professional cleaning or inspection every few years to ensure peak performance.

props.heading: Our Installation Process
props.description: We handle everything from the initial design to the final switch flip.

steps.title: Free Assessment & Proposal
steps.desc: We start with a conversation to understand your goals. Using satellite data, we design a custom system and present a clear proposal with economics.

steps.title: Site Survey
steps.desc: Our engineering team visits your home to inspect the roof condition, measure shading, and check your electrical panel capacity.

steps.title: Contract & Permitting
steps.desc: Once you approve the design, we handle all the paperwork. We submit building permits to the city and interconnection applications to the utility.

steps.title: Installation
steps.desc: Most Residential installs take just 1-3 days. Our in-house crew works efficiently and respects your property, leaving the site cleaner than we found it.

steps.title: Inspection & Activation
steps.desc: We schedule the final city inspection. Once approved, the utility grants 'Permission to Operate', and you can turn on your clean power plant!

faqs.q: How much does residential solar cost in Australia?
faqs.a: System prices vary depending on size and equipment, but after government incentives, most systems are far more affordable than people expect.

faqs.q: How long do solar panels last?
faqs.a: Most panels come with 25-year performance warranties and often last even longer.
Solar systems still generate electricity in cloudy weather — just at reduced output.
Batteries are ideal for households wanting energy independence, blackout protection, and maximum savings from their solar system.

faqs.q: How long until I see savings?
faqs.a: Most homeowners notice reduced electricity bills immediately after installation.
